name: Barbecued Beef Ribs
recipeIngredient: 8 lb Beef ribs from standing rib roast
recipeInstructions:
Created by Great American Food and Beverage Co, Santa Monica.
1. Arrange beef ribs on a rack in a baking pan.
2. Saute onion and garlic in oil until golden brown.
3. Add mustard, tomato puree, sugar, soy sauce, vinegar, bay leaves, hot pepper sauce, barbecue spice (if using), and salt to the onions and garlic. Simmer about 15 minutes.
4. Strain the mixture through a fine mesh sieve or cheesecloth into a bowl, discarding solids.
5. Brush the barbecue sauce generously over the beef ribs, ensuring they are covered thoroughly.
6. Bake at 375°F to 400°F for 45 minutes, basting frequently with the sauce until the beef ribs are tender and well done.
7. Store any remaining sauce, covered, in the refrigerator.
